---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, view, or collector
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Lead with the scenario, not the
solution. "I'm trying to debug X and currently have to do Y" is more useful
than "please add Z". -->

## Proposed approach (optional)

<!-- If you already have an implementation idea, describe it. Otherwise leave
blank — the maintainers will discuss approaches before any code is written. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Existing tools (perf, bpftrace, strace) or workflows you've tried, and
why they fall short. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots of similar features in other tools, links to related issues,
RFC drafts, etc. -->
